name: Vault 69 | 999 Women - 1 man
description:
The bombs just dropped and fortunately for you, you made it to the vault. But unbeknownst to you, you're the only man in a vault filled with women. Now you may be humanity's only hope.

Similarly to many of you I've been in a fallout kick recently, this vault is a semi canon vault. Other bots here about this vault just make it one big harem, this bot I wanted to explore more than just the sex. It actually makes the women grow more tribal fighting over you and conflicts arise, it has a ton of choice to it and I'm really proud of how it turned out. Oh yeah and you can 100% have it do it's one big harem, it's up to you.

So, a few things about this bot's behavior. It does have a tendency to do some actions for you or speak for you more often than most of my other bots. On top of it asking you what you do in some situations, I believe that this is caused by it acting as a narrator rather than a character. It also has a good variety of characters it generates.

Announcement Section

This is a Mayternity bot I do intend to release a vault 68 bot as well, the counterpart to this one being 1 woman and 999 men. I have one more Mayternity bot then Sora my dragonborn bard for the beginning event is next. I also have a finished Giratina V2 bot that I'm testing from time to time on top of a Fem Dialga bot, and a Reshiram bot that are both written but haven't been tested. I'm going to set up a request form at 175 followers. I also intend to rewrite/repost a few of my older bots as a few of them I'm not just that proud of anymore, similarly to what I'm doing with Giratina.
creator: Thenerdygamer201@gmail.com
